summary: Iteration 13: Reports Enhancement testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). New Cash Flow endpoint working with operating/investing/financing sections. Reports page has 3 tabs (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) with FY-aware date defaults and group-wise subtotals. Fixed nested tbody HTML issue in Reports.js.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cash-flow - returns operating/investing/financing with totals
Backend: GET /api/profit-loss - returns grouped data with group_name
Backend: GET /api/financial-years - returns FY list with start/end dates
Backend: GET /api/trial-balance - returns balanced trial balance
Frontend: Reports page loads with 3 tabs (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)
Frontend: FY selector auto-populates dates and loads report
Frontend: Switching FY changes date range
Frontend: P&L report shows group-wise subtotals (DIRECT INCOME, INDIRECT EXPENSES headers)
Frontend: Balance Sheet report shows grouped items (CASH-IN-HAND, BANK ACCOUNTS, CAPITAL ACCOUNT)
Frontend: Cash Flow tab displays Operating, Investing, Financing sections
Frontend: Accounting view navigation works (Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Vouchers, Daybook, Trial Balance, Reports, Settings)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed nested tbody HTML issue in Reports.js - changed inner <tbody> to <React.Fragment> to prevent hydration errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified the Reports Enhancement features: 1) New Cash Flow endpoint at /api/cash-flow returns operating/investing/financing sections with totals, opening_cash, closing_cash, net_cash_change. 2) Reports page has 3 tabs with FY-aware date defaults. 3) P&L and Balance Sheet show group-wise subtotals. 4) Fixed nested tbody HTML issue in Reports.js. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend navigation and all report tabs working correctly. Data is mostly in FY 2024-25 range.
